## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checks

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] Documentation, examples, or command references updated where needed.
- [ ] User-visible changes added under `Unreleased` in `CHANGELOG.md`, or this
      change does not require a changelog entry.
- [ ] Core is treated as an implicit substrate prerequisite, not a normal package dependency.
- [ ] Deployment provenance comes from artifact metadata where possible.
- [ ] No committed wrapper or manifest hard-codes a git commit hash.
- [ ] Destructive behavior remains explicit and is not part of the default install path.
- [ ] Oracle-native SQL*Plus/SQLcl workflows and transparent logs are preserved.

## Testing

List the commands you ran. If you could not run a relevant test, explain why.
